steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says dust can have "complex and opposing effects on tropical cyclones." The first effect (enhancing ice clouds) is introduced with "On one hand," — so the blank must introduce the contrasting effect that follows.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — On the other hand,: the standard pairing with "On one hand," — signals the opposite effect (dust weakening the storm). ✓
  • Choice B — Previously,: signals a time shift, not a contrast between two effects. ✗
  • Choice C — For example,: introduces an illustration, not an opposing idea. ✗
  • Choice D — In other words,: signals a restatement, but the second effect is the opposite of the first, not a restatement. ✗
A is correct.
